en.name: OP-SKS "Relic Reborn"
en.description: This OP-SKS started life as a quiet civilian hunting carbine, the kind of rifle that should have stayed behind a cabin door and aged in peace. Tony saw something older under the varnish: a forgotten war relic with enough steel left to misbehave. He rebuilt the action, replaced the fire-control work, and converted it to full-auto. The old SKS does not become modern — it becomes furious. Relic Reborn is what happens when a hunting rifle remembers it came from a battlefield.
